scripts.dev: DATABASE_HOST=turing.se.kmitl.ac.th DATABASE_PORT=5502 poetry run gunicorn app.asgi:application -k uvicorn.workers.UvicornWorker -b 0.0.0.0:5500 --reload --keyfile certs/key.pem --certfile certs/cert.pem
scripts.dev:network: DATABASE_HOST=turing.se.kmitl.ac.th DATABASE_PORT=5502 ENV_FILE=.env.network poetry run gunicorn app.asgi:application -k uvicorn.workers.UvicornWorker -b 0.0.0.0:5500 --reload --keyfile certs/key.pem --certfile certs/cert.pem
scripts.migrate: DATABASE_HOST=turing.se.kmitl.ac.th DATABASE_PORT=5502 poetry run python manage.py migrate
scripts.makemigrations: DATABASE_HOST=turing.se.kmitl.ac.th DATABASE_PORT=5502 poetry run python manage.py makemigrations
scripts.shell: DATABASE_HOST=turing.se.kmitl.ac.th DATABASE_PORT=5502 poetry run python manage.py shell
scripts.lint: poetry run ruff check . || echo 'ruff not installed'
scripts.test: poetry run pytest || echo 'pytest not installed'
